mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, goods_id, goods_name, goods_price, quantity, total_amount, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (order_no, user_id, goods_id, goods_name, goods_price, quantity, total_amount, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{goodsName}, #{goodsPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
